001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.view.LayoutInflater;
004import android.view.ViewGroup;
005import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
006import androidx.recyclerview.widget.DiffUtil;
007import androidx.recyclerview.widget.ListAdapter;
008import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.ItemBatchBinding;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchCardSummary;
011import java.time.LocalDate;
012import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;
013import java.util.Objects;
014
015/**
016 * RecyclerView adapter for displaying batch card summaries in a list.
017 */
018public class BatchAdapter extends ListAdapter<BatchCardSummary, BatchAdapter.ViewHolder> {
019
020  private static final DateTimeFormatter DATE_FORMATTER =
021      DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, uuuu");
022  private final OnBatchClickListener listener;
023
024  /**
025   * Constructs a BatchAdapter with the specified click listener.
026   *
027   * @param listener the listener to handle batch item clicks
028   */
029  public BatchAdapter(OnBatchClickListener listener) {
030    super(DIFF_CALLBACK);
031    this.listener = listener;
032  }
033
034  @NonNull
035  @Override
036  public ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType) {
037    ItemBatchBinding binding = ItemBatchBinding.inflate(
038        LayoutInflater.from(parent.getContext()), parent, false);
039    return new ViewHolder(binding);
040  }
041
042  @Override
043  public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull ViewHolder holder, int position) {
044    BatchCardSummary batch = getItem(position);
045    holder.bind(batch);
046    holder.itemView.setOnClickListener(v -> listener.onBatchClick(batch.getBatchId()));
047  }
048
049  /**
050   * Functional interface for handling batch item click events.
051   */
052  @FunctionalInterface
053  public interface OnBatchClickListener {
054
055    /**
056     * Called when a batch item is clicked.
057     *
058     * @param batchId the ID of the clicked batch
059     */
060    void onBatchClick(long batchId);
061  }
062
063  /**
064   * ViewHolder for displaying a batch card summary.
065   */
066  public static class ViewHolder extends RecyclerView.ViewHolder {
067
068    private final ItemBatchBinding binding;
069
070    /**
071     * Constructs a ViewHolder with the specified binding.
072     *
073     * @param binding the view binding for the batch item
074     */
075    public ViewHolder(@NonNull ItemBatchBinding binding) {
076      super(binding.getRoot());
077      this.binding = binding;
078    }
079
080    /**
081     * Binds a batch card summary to this ViewHolder's views.
082     *
083     * @param batch the batch card summary to display
084     */
085    public void bind(@NonNull BatchCardSummary batch) {
086      binding.batchTitle.setText(formatTitle(batch));
087      binding.batchBreedSummary.setText(formatBreedSummary(batch));
088      binding.batchIncubator.setText(formatIncubator(batch));
089      binding.batchViability.setText(formatViability(batch));
090      binding.batchNextMilestone.setText(formatNextMilestone(batch));
091      binding.batchNextMilestoneDate.setText(formatNextMilestoneDate(batch));
092    }
093
094    private String formatTitle(BatchCardSummary batch) {
095      Integer batchNumber = batch.getBatchNumber();
096      return (batchNumber != null)
097          ? "Batch #" + batchNumber
098          : "Batch";
099    }
100
101    private String formatBreedSummary(BatchCardSummary batch) {
102      String summary = batch.getBreedSummary();
103      return (summary != null && !summary.isBlank())
104          ? summary
105          : "Breed pending";
106    }
107
108    private String formatIncubator(BatchCardSummary batch) {
109      String name = batch.getIncubatorName();
110      return (name != null && !name.isBlank())
111          ? "Incubator: " + name
112          : "Incubator: Unassigned";
113    }
114
115    private String formatViability(BatchCardSummary batch) {
116      return String.format(
117          "%d/%d viable (%.1f%%)",
118          batch.getViableCount(),
119          batch.getTotalEggCount(),
120          batch.getViabilityRate() * 100.0
121      );
122    }
123
124    private String formatNextMilestone(BatchCardSummary batch) {
125      String label = batch.getNextMilestoneLabel();
126      return (label != null && !label.isBlank())
127          ? label
128          : "Next milestone unavailable";
129    }
130
131    private String formatNextMilestoneDate(BatchCardSummary batch) {
132      LocalDate date = batch.getNextMilestoneDate();
133      return (date != null) ? DATE_FORMATTER.format(date) : "";
134    }
135  }
136
137  private static final DiffUtil.ItemCallback<BatchCardSummary> DIFF_CALLBACK =
138      new DiffUtil.ItemCallback<>() {
139        @Override
140        public boolean areItemsTheSame(@NonNull BatchCardSummary oldItem,
141            @NonNull BatchCardSummary newItem) {
142          return oldItem.getBatchId() == newItem.getBatchId();
143        }
144
145        @Override
146        public boolean areContentsTheSame(@NonNull BatchCardSummary oldItem,
147            @NonNull BatchCardSummary newItem) {
148          return Objects.equals(oldItem.getBatchNumber(), newItem.getBatchNumber())
149              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getIncubatorName(), newItem.getIncubatorName())
150              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getBreedSummary(), newItem.getBreedSummary())
151              && oldItem.getViableCount() == newItem.getViableCount()
152              && oldItem.getTotalEggCount() == newItem.getTotalEggCount()
153              && Double.compare(oldItem.getViabilityRate(), newItem.getViabilityRate()) == 0
154              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getExpectedHatchDate(), newItem.getExpectedHatchDate())
155              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getNextMilestoneLabel(), newItem.getNextMilestoneLabel())
156              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getNextMilestoneDate(), newItem.getNextMilestoneDate());
157        }
158      };
159}
